name: Legendary Hero: Altina
description:
Altina, within the context of Fire Emblem Heroes, is a legendary figure of immense historical significance, originating from the Tellius series. She is revered as the first empress of Begnion and a pivotal hero who played a crucial role in shaping the world's history. Her most iconic trait is her mastery of dual wielding, wielding the sacred blades Ragnell and Alondite with unparalleled skill. Beyond her combat prowess, Altina is depicted as a figure of noble bearing, radiating a sense of resolute strength and unwavering conviction. Her presence in Fire Emblem Heroes extends beyond her original depiction, with various seasonal and special versions that showcase different aspects of her character. These alternate versions highlight her adaptability and the enduring nature of her heroic legacy. Whether she is portrayed in her legendary form, wielding her iconic swords, or in festive attire, Altina consistently embodies a sense of power and grace that sets her apart. Her connection to the goddesses Ashera and Yune further underscores her importance in the lore, solidifying her status as a figure of divine significance.

(Bor Created withGemini. Lol)
creator: JacksonCrawford
